---
name: Feature Request
description: Suggest a new feature or improvement for AlphaBook
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem Description

A clear and concise description of the problem or limitation you're experiencing.
Ex. "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you'd like to happen. Include details about how the feature should work from a user's perspective.

## Alternatives Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered, and why you believe the proposed solution is preferable.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, screenshots, or references about the feature request here. If this relates to a specific part of AlphaBook (e.g., the order book, a mini-game, the admin dashboard), please mention it.
